rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CHARLES YOUNG CHONG et al TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Instructions To Trustee Aaron Chong; Compel Trustee To Provide Information Render Proper Accounting, And Distribute Trust Assets
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The Court to determine how best to proceed: should Aaron Chong, as successor trustee of the Survivor's Trust, be compelled to account to the Court, provide the Court with a payment schedule for all remaining payments due to the three beneficiaries, and provide the Court with all supporting documents limited to Aaron Chong's legal fees/trustee fees, or is this petition time barred? If the successor trustee is ordered to account, LRSF 14.35 A. requires the first accounting period to be limited to two years; thereafter, accounting periods may not exceed three years. Due to COVID-19, counsel and parties should appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall whenever possible. Please review the 10th amended general order on the courtâs website for information on appearing remotely. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 875 8017 7925 and password is 722809. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING USING THEIR FULL NAME.

rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/27/2021. Examiner has only received the courtesy copy of the petition filed 4/26/2021. Endorsed-filed single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be received by Examiner in room 202 at the Superior Court. Examiners will not review any document until after it has been filed and a courtesy copy has been received. [LRSF 2.7, 14.7]. Courtesy copies dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the top cover page or on the envelope, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date, with the scheduled hearing date noted on the face sheet. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the top cover page or on the envelope, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 10/11/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARY B AGONOY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Determining Percentage Of Estate To Be Distributed To Each Beneficiary
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) To ascertain all heirs of Gavino Agonoy, Petitioner alleges that he contacted all known relatives of Decedent and Gavino Agonoy in order to compile the list of family members provided in the petition. Court to determine whether this allegation is sufficient to find that all beneficiaries have been ascertained. 2) Petitioner alleges that it is unknown whether an alleged heir, Glenda Madriaga, is alive. Petitioner states that she disappeared 20 years ago and believes that she would have contacted her children or other family members if she did not die at that time. Petitioner requests a determination that her 4 children are entitled to her share. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review the 10th amended general order. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Information regarding appearance by CourtCall can be found in the 10th amended general order.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF L. JULIUS M. TURMAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) The declaration filed on 8/27/21 has not been verified by the administrator. The following are also noted: a. The beneficiary's date of death is stated to be 10/7/19, which contradicts what was stated in the verified declaration filed on 11/12/20. b. Tax payments totaling over $240k were made; however, only $150k in reserve was allowed. c. A total of $580,200 was distributed, which was much less than what was alleged to have been distributed per 11/12/20 verified declaration. Additionally, the accounting shows that it was distributed to Administrator FBO the beneficiary, and not directly to the beneficiary, as was alleged in the 11/12/20 verified declaration. d. The accounting only runs through 12/23/20, at which time $105,643.89 was on hand. 2) Original letters of administration (within past 60 days) have not been filed, despite attorney being reminded of the requirement. 3) No substantiation has been filed showing that distributions were properly made, despite attorney being reminded of the requirement. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review the 10th amended general order. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Information regarding appearance by CourtCall can be found in the 10th amended general order.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF TERRY HILDA SMOLAR
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The Court to determine if the executor's first and final account for the period 6/7/2019 - 5/13/2021 should be approved and if all relief requested in the accompanying petition should be granted despite the numerous issues posted in the tentative ruling for the hearing on 9/14/21. 1) The beginning balance of assets is not supported by the I&As. (See Citibank Checking account xxx6081 balance in the Corrected Partial I&A filed on 3/30/21 v. the balance shown on Schedule 1.) 2) The accounting does not show any payment to the initial Probate Referee ($336.50 commission). 3) The executor reportedly reimbursed the estate $12,432.00 for funeral costs he reimbursed himself without Court authorization ($11,100 + $1,332 for 10% interest), but the accounting does not reflect this; it appears that he reimbursed himself a total of $16,577.77 on 2/28/2020 and $5,550.00 on 3/2/2020 but reimbursed the estate a total of just $6,216.00 on 3/25/2021. 4) The accounting appears to indicate that there was litigation with the condo association (the Carlisle), but the report does not disclose this. 5) Payment to a third party to prepare the accounting must be deducted from the executor's statutory compensation. [See also LRSF 14.36 I.6.a.iii.] 6) Tangible personal property was reportedly distributed in equal shares to the two beneficiaries, but no receipts have been filed. [LRSF 14.36 I.6.c.] 7) Costs to be reimbursed to the attorney ($1,070.00) have not been itemized. (The date, payee, description, and amount must be set forth for each cost.) 8) Additional issues not posted in the tentative ruling for the hearing on 9/14/21: a) The petition does not state the date on which notice to the Franchise Tax Board was mailed. [Prob. C. Sect. 9202(c) and LRSF 14.36 I.2.] b) Receipts of principal (refunds for amounts paid during administration) may not be included in the fee base. Due to COVID-19, counsel and parties should appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall whenever possible. Please review the 10th amended general order on the court's website for information on appearing remotely. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 875 8017 7925 and password is 722809. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING USING THEIR FULL NAME.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROMANA T LANG
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION

rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/9/21 . (No earlier availability.) Issues necessitating continuance: The supplement filed on 8/20/21 shows just subtotals for each category of disbursements due to the trust, no itemization of the amounts making up each category as shown in the accounts, so that the subtotals can be confirmed against the accounting. (When did the trust pay for auto insurance for which the conservatorship estate must reimburse the trust?) The "amended" notice of hearing filed on 8/12/21 still shows that it was verified on 6/22/21, the date that the incomplete proof of service was verified. The amended reduced bond cannot be granted without notice. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 10/29/21 . Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RHEMER TRUST DATED JULY 1, 2011 AS AMENDED AND RESTATED ON OCTOBER 31, 2013 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/9/21 . (No earlier availability.) Issues necessitating continuance: Likely as a result of Court clerks being severely understaffed, no courtesy copy of the supplement filed on 8/17/21 has been received yet by the Examiner. The "amended" notice of hearing (which should have been just a new proof of service of the original notice of hearing, as the notice itself was not amended) filed on 8/10/21 shows that it was verified on 6/22/21, which was the same date that the incomplete proof of service was verified, likely not the date that this corrected proof of service was verified The attorney's costs do not indicate what was E-filed; just lump sums for each month are set forth in the fee invoice. And why was the E-filing fee for this first report $40? Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 10/29/21. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MIGUEL Q URIA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/9/21. (No earlier availability.) An amended petition was just filed on 9/9/21 (and not actually E-filed, i.e., available for viewing, until 9/13/21). An amended pleading requires the same notice of hearing (including publication) as the pleading it amends. [CRC 7.53(a).] Notice mailed before the pleading requiring notice has been filed is defective. [LRSF 14.14 A.] In any event, notice could not have been sufficient for this hearing. No proof of publication has been filed yet for the amended petition. ("Petitioner" is not a relationship to the decedent.) Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 10/29/21. Courtesy copies are file stamped hard copies. Examiners will not review unfiled papers. [LRSF 14.7 C.] Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MIGUEL Q URIA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/9/21. (No earlier availability.) Still no proof of publication has been filed and no proposed order has been submitted or received yet by the assigned Examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 41.60 E.] Nothing has been filed yet to provide authority for the Court to admit an unsigned and undated will or to provide the dates of death of all deceased devisees and heirs, as previously noted in the tentative ruling for the hearing on 9/7/21. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 10/29/21. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.
